subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Lord of existence Who, through His Beloved Name, hath illumined the hearts of His chosen ones with the light of divine knowledge and glorified them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک وجود را که باسم محبوب قلوب اولیایش را بنور عرفان منور فرمود و بعز
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prophecy and fulfillment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rejection, opposition and persecution
